title: zehneria angulata
intro: Zehneria angulata, also known as the angled zehneria or angled creeping vine, is a type of flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zehneria angulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Zehneria angulata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
